title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MOLMOL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MOLMOL, MUNICIPALITY OF JOSE ABAD SANTOS, PROVINCE OF DAVAO OCCIDENTAL INTO AN INTEGRATED SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE MARIANO ANOY SANGAY INTEGRATED SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
Daily Tribune, May 24, 2022; 118 OG No. 22, 6358 (May 30, 2022)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11763, April 29, 2022 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE MOLMOL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MOLMOL, MUNICIPALITY OF JOSE ABAD SANTOS, PROVINCE OF DAVAO OCCIDENTAL INTO AN INTEGRATED SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE MARIANO ANOY SANGAY INTEGRATED SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

The Molmol Elementary School in Barangay Molmol, Municipality of Jose Abad Santos, Province of Davao Occidental is hereby converted into an integrated school to be known as the Mariano Anoy Sangay Integrated School.

SEC. 2. All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Molmol Elementary School are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Mariano Anoy Sangay Integrated School.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the Mariano Anoy Sangay Integrated School, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4. Within sixty (60) days after the approval of this Act, the Secretary of Education shall promulgate the rules and regulations implementing the provisions of this Act.

SEC. 5. This Act shall become effective fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

LORD ALLAN JAY Q. VELASCO

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on November 8, 2021 and January 31, 2022, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

MARK LLANDRO L. MENDOZA

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

APR 29 2022

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
